definition: Fault predictive gate is positive. Treat as risk-first routing; context tags remain secondary.
operator_action: Review risk evidence and prepare inspection/dispatch candidate.

definition: Fault gate is not positive, task post-event context classifier is positive.
operator_action: Use as maintenance/work context, not advance prediction.

definition: Activity pre/post candidate signal is positive, but activity is missingness-sensitive and not locked as predictive.
No selected fault/task/activity signal is positive.
